mapper.sql: select m.id, m.bill_no, m.warehouse_id, m.import_operator, m.import_time, m.stock_gen_time, m.bill_status, m.remark, m.del_flag, m.tenant_id, m.create_by, m.create_time, m.update_by, m.update_time, m.audit_by, m.audit_time, m.delete_by, m.delete_time, w.id wId, w.code warehouseCode, w.name warehouseName from stk_initial_import m left join fd_warehouse w on m.warehouse_id = w.id
mapper.select: where m.id = #{id} and (m.del_flag = 0 or m.del_flag is null) and m.tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
select bill_no from stk_initial_import where bill_no like concat(#{datePrefix}, '%') and char_length(bill_no) >= 15 order by cast(substring(bill_no, 11) as unsigned) desc limit 1
mapper.insert: insert into stk_initial_import (id, bill_no, warehouse_id, import_operator, import_time, stock_gen_time, bill_status, remark, del_flag, tenant_id, create_by, create_time, audit_by, audit_time) values (#{id}, #{billNo}, #{warehouseId}, #{importOperator}, #{importTime}, #{stockGenTime}, #{billStatus}, #{remark}, 0, #{tenantId}, #{createBy}, #{createTime}, #{auditBy}, #{auditTime})
mapper.update: update stk_initial_import set del_flag = 1, delete_by = #{deleteBy}, delete_time = now(), update_time = now() where id = #{id} and tenant_id = #{scopedTenantId}
